series_description: Form used to change the address or other information on a warrant.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative use

series_description: Files for each student whose loan(s) were discharged in accordance with federal regulations due to the closure of the school the borrower/student attended. Files contain the OSAC Certification Statement/Application for Loan Discharge, lender claim form (
